kernel_subject: net: dev: Makes sure netif_rx() can be invoked in any context.
stage1_reason: Direct replacement of netif_rx_ni() with netif_rx() due to kernel API change documented in commit baebdf48c3600, which made netif_rx() safe in any context.
stage2_reason: Driver commit replaces netif_rx_ni() with netif_rx() exactly matching kernel commit baebdf48c360 that made netif_rx() safe in any context, enabling this direct API substitution.
